title: Antitrust Laws: If the merger increases the Herfindahl-Hirschman Index (HHI) by more...
summary: Assess whether a merger increasing the HHI above a regulatory threshold may face antitrust opposition.
prompt: If the merger increases the Herfindahl-Hirschman Index (HHI) by more than 100, it may be blocked by regulators.
solution: An increase in the HHI indicates greater market concentration, which could raise antitrust concerns and potentially lead to a blocked merger.
